political.s: Amazon (parent company) spent $31.3M on political contributions and lobbying in 2024, with PAC contributions showing over two-thirds going to Republicans. Amazon contributed to election deniers and shows bipartisan lobbying approach on tech/antitrust issues.

charity.s: Amazon Fresh partners with Feeding America and food banks to donate surplus inventory. Parent company reports 59M meals donated to food banks and 34M meals delivered through community programs. Fresh stores participate in local food rescue initiatives.

environment.s: Amazon Fresh Seattle store achieved Zero Carbon Certification. Parent company committed to net-zero emissions by 2040 and offers 600,000+ Climate Pledge Friendly products. Testing bio-based packaging in Spain and avoiding plastic-heavy solutions.

labor.s: Amazon Fresh warehouse workers unionized in Seattle in 2022. Parent company faces 250+ NLRB complaints; multiple OSHA citations for ergonomic hazards, inadequate medical care, and injury underreporting. December 2024 settlement required ergonomic risk assessments. Injury rates 75% higher than industry average.

dei.s: Amazon halted DEI programs in December 2024, 'winding down outdated programs and materials.' Removed specific sections on Black equity and LGBTQ+ rights from company website. VP stated focus shifting from 'bolted on' programs to 'built in' approaches.

animals.s: As grocery retailer, Amazon Fresh maintains animal welfare standards requiring suppliers to comply with zero-tolerance approach to animal cruelty and abuse.

guns.s: Not applicable for grocery delivery/retail service.

privacy.s: Amazon collects extensive customer data through Fresh orders, Alexa integration, and delivery addresses. Tracks body shapes and palm prints via cashier-less store technology. 2021 lawsuit filed over biometric surveillance. Parent company states it does not sell personal data but shares with third parties.

execPay.s: Not disclosed for Amazon Fresh subsidiary specifically. Parent company Amazon CEO Andy Jassy compensation significantly exceeds worker pay, with warehouse worker complaints about wage-to-executive pay disparity.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
